name: @moolam/telemetry
description: Internal component of Sutra SDK — applications should install sutra-sdk. Cognitive friction telemetry: interaction observation folded into durable, protocol-level friction samples. Shared by edge and cloud hosts.

scripts.test: node --test tests/collector.test.mjs tests/aggregation.test.mjs tests/aggregation_consent_rollup.test.mjs tests/trajectory_format.test.mjs tests/trajectory_format_fixtures.test.mjs tests/trajectory_writer.test.mjs tests/trajectory_writer_load.test.mjs
